steps.title: Identify the defining signal
steps.content: The narrator shifts from self-criticism with “but I did come to know a truly great man” and then stresses the value of his experience: “I spent years at his side. I watched the way he worked. I witnessed...” The passage fundamentally focuses on the narrator's appreciation for the extensive time spent observing an admired person.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: C directly captures the narrator's point: “A person appreciates the extensive time he passed in the company of someone he deeply admired.” The other three either introduce content not discussed in the text (romantic love in A, the great man's strategic humility in B) or shift focus from the narrator's appreciation for years spent together to the great man's creative process (D). That matches choice C — C is correct.
